data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Email confirmations', which is explicitly stated in the linked use case. However, there is no evidence provided that confirms the existence of email confirmations being sent to customers after booking. The absence of any evidence related to email confirmations indicates a clear gap in meeting this requirement.
gaps: No evidence confirming that email confirmations are sent to customers after booking.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
